Aidan Perkins has cast his eye on all 18 Champions League games during Matchday Three this week and has a score prediction for each game.

arts.ttl: Liverpool-Chelsea recap, Real Madrid woes, more soccer news
arts.sum: In the Premier League, Liverpool edged past Chelsea in a game that honestly showed the best of both sides, while in LaLiga, Real Madrid got another gritty win despite still not looking like the juggernaut everyone expected when Kylian Mbappé joined in the summer. Elsewhere: Barcelona welcomed back Gavi after a long injury lay-off and thrashed Sevilla, Harry Kane scored a hat-trick for Bayern Munich to snap his scoring drought, and Arsenal's latest red card nightmare may signal something gloomier about their status as title contenders.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid’s Thibaut Courtois responds to Diego Simeone – ‘I have no problem being sung at, but no violence’
arts.sum: Real Madrid goalkeeper Thibaut Courtois has spoken for the first time since the Madrid derby in September, which was temporarily suspended due to lighters being thrown at the Belgian. Los Colchoneros have also seen their singing section banned for a game. The veteran goalkeeper was asked about Diego Simeone’s words after the match, who suggested […] The post Real Madrid’s Thibaut Courtois responds to Diego Simeone – ‘I have no problem being sung at, but no violence’ appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Hacked: Juventus ‘announce’ signing of Real Madrid star
arts.sum: Activity on the official ‘X’ account of Italian giants Juventus has gone viral online on Monday. This comes after the Bianconeri, out of the blue, ‘announced’ the signing of Real…

arts.ttl: How Mbappe is KILLING Bellingham at Real Madrid
arts.sum: Prior to the season, when Real Madrid announced the signing of Kylian Mbappe, there were fears that the French megastar would curtail Bellingham's attacking influence and those fears were well-founded. Jude Bellingham is struggling to recapture his amazing form from last season in part due to Kylian Mbappe's presence at Real Madrid .

arts.ttl: Thibaut Courtois: “Andriy Lunin makes me better in training”
arts.sum: Real Madrid goalkeeper Thibaut Courtois was the chosen player to represent Los Blancos in front of the press ahead of the UEFA Champions League game against Borussia Dortmund, speaking at Valdebebas on a number of topics, including Andriy Lunin, on which he reflected that “I try to help him, he makes me better in training too to show why I should play and not him, that competition helps. Physically after a long season, to have two or three weeks of rest, team-mates like Fede or Rodrygo, who come from South America and have to play here, it’s demanding but I think we can keep winning games.”

arts.ttl: Hacked Juventus account announces transfer of Real Madrid star Arda Guler
arts.sum: The news stunned fans of both Juventus and Real Madrid, before the club’s Italian account confirmed that their channels had been compromised
